name: Czechoslovakian Liverballs/Liver Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
These liverballs are cooked in chicken soup.
Combine: liver, onion, parsley and egg in a food processor until smooth. Add salt, pepper, marjoram, flour, and bread crumbs. Refrigerate for two hours until cold and firmish. Cook.
To cook: In boiling chicken broth, drop liver from large tablespoon. When the last ball enters the broth, return the broth to boil, reduce to simmer, cover pot, and simmer 10 minutes.
